_comment: Lemmas verified against UDPipe RRT (model romanian-rrt-ud-2.17-251125). Reflexive clitics lemmatize to 'sine' for 3rd-person and to the corresponding personal pronoun (eu/tu/noi/voi) for 1st/2nd. Compound past tenses insert AUX 'avea' between clitic and main verb. v1 ships canonical-tense entries; compound-tense variants for the highest-frequency idioms can be added as separate entries. Verify any new entry via: pnpm tsx scripts/inspect-lemmas.ts "<sentence>"

entries.notes: lit. 'to give oneself account' — covers present-tense 3rd person reflexive: își dă seama
compound past, 3rd person: și-a dat seama / și-au dat seama
compound past, 1st person: mi-am dat seama / ne-am dat seama
compound past, 2nd person: ți-ai dat seama / v-ați dat seama
lit. 'to put into account'; UDPipe misparses 'bag' as NOUN but lemma is reliable
infinitive / other forms of a băga de seamă
lit. 'to put in account'
lit. 'to hold mind'
lit. 'to have care'
lit. 'to have rightness'
lit. 'to have need'
lit. 'to have place'
lit. 'to make acquaintance'
neutral
lit. 'to put end'
also: 'to give rise to'
lit. 'to jump in eyes'
always reflexive (a se uita la); seed match assumes preceding 'se'/'mă'/'te' clitic in real text
lit. 'in the first row'
la urma urmei — 'at the end of ends'
memorized
subordinating conjunction phrase
followed by subjunctive verb
full correlative: cu atât mai mult cu cât — 'the more...the more'
standalone form; full correlative has cu cât extension
lit. 'with other words'; cuvinte lemmatizes to cuvânt
cu toate acestea — lit. 'with all these'
equative comparator before adjective: la fel de important = just as important
also: vis-à-vis, in relation to
ciuda → ciudă; always followed by genitive noun
în cadrul — surface always definite (cadrul), lemma is cadru; 'within the framework of'
also: except for
în urma [gen] = following/after an event; same lemma also appears in 'cu o oră în urmă' (an hour ago)

entries.gloss: from the point of view of

entries.notes: pe parcursul — surface definite (parcursul), lemma is parcurs
lit. 'to make face'; a face față — always followed by dative
a ține cont de; lit. 'to hold account'
a face parte din; lit. 'to make part'
a-și aduce aminte / a aduce aminte de; lit. 'to bring to mind'
a da dovadă de; lit. 'to give proof'
a pune accent pe; lit. 'to put accent'
a lua în considerare
a lua în seamă; contrast with a băga în seamă (to acknowledge)
